import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression

def task_func(df, x_column, y_column):
    # Creating a linear regression model and fitting it to the data
    lm = LinearRegression()
    X = df[x_column]
    Y = df[y_column]
    lm.fit(X, Y)

    # Preparing figures and scatter plot
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.scatter(df[x_column], df[y_column], color='blue')

    # Plotting the regression line on the same Axes
    x_new = np.linspace(min(X), max(X), 100)
    y_pred = lm.predict(np.array(x_new).reshape(-1, 1))
    ax.plot(x_new, y_pred, color='red')

    # Formatting the plot
    plt.xlabel(x_column)
    plt.ylabel(y_column)
    plt.title('Linear Regression Scatter Plot')

    return ax
